CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-18-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank J. Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Philip H. Knudsen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Brandon Smith, by his Guardian ad Litem, Vajezatha Smith.
The Court previously waived the appearance of Brandon Smith and Vajezatha Smith at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendants Kenneth Hightower or Jennifer Hightower.
Defaults entered against defendants on December 10, 2007.
Doe defendants dismissed on August 26, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Brandon Smith, by his Guardian ad Litem, Vajezatha Smith, and against the Defaulted Defendants Kenneth Hightower and Jennifer Hightower as follows:

From Defendant Kenneth Hightower:

Damages/Principal - $50,000.0022,611.87
Costs - $942.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $50,942.00.

From Defendant Jennifer Hightower:

Damages/Principal - $10,000.00
Costs - $942.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $10,942.00.

Judgments were submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2008 Continued To Oct-10-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-26-2008 Continued To Sep-18-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Philip H. Knudsen, Esq. appeared for petitioner Vajezatha Smith, the guardian ad litem for the minor Brandon Smith, neither of whom were present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendants Kenneth Hightower or Jennifer Hightower.
Dismissal as to defendant San Francisco Unified School District was filed on August 22, 2008.
Default entered as to defendants Kenneth & Jennifer Hightower on December 7, 2007.
Doe defendants dismissed today, August 26, 2008.

The Court requires additional documentation from petitioner in order to proceed with the Default Prove-Up Hearing. Good cause appearing, this matter is continued to September 18, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2008 Continued To Aug-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-17-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Compromise the Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Philip H. Knudsen, Esq. appeared with petitioner Vajezatha Smith, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minor Brandon Smith, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $1,500.00.
Attorney's Fees - $375.00.
Costs - $821.00.

A net balance of $304.00 shall be deposited into a blocked account. No withdrawals shall be made without a Written Court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Hearing On Petition To Approve A Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of An Minor.
